prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical portrait photograph of an elegant adult woman in a refined indoor bathroom or spa-like interior, framed from the upper chest to just above the head. She has dark brown wavy hair pulled back loosely into a low ponytail with natural flyaways, one ear visible, warm tan skin, and a slim neck with realistic collarbones, subtle skin sheen, pores, small moles, and natural texture. Her face is intentionally covered by one large opaque square censor block centered over the face, using a smooth warm brown-to-taupe vertical gradient that hides all facial features while leaving the hairline, ear, neck, and shoulders visible. She wears a champagne ivory silky V-neck robe or blouse with soft satin highlights and relaxed shoulders. Use warm natural sunlight from the left, gentle shadows across the neck and fabric, shallow depth of field, and a high-end editorial fashion photography look. Background: softly blurred marble wall panels, muted beige-gray tones, a vertical brass or gold trim line on the right, a faint hanging lamp at the upper right, and blurred white flowers on the left. Composition should feel candid and photorealistic, with realistic skin texture and natural body features, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no exaggerated beauty retouching. Use 3:4 vertical framing and warm late-afternoon sunlight.
